But so simply if you look left on the chart you can find these intraday reversal patterns in so many things and then you can actually find the trades that occur after them, which is why we wanted to arm you with these five really key intraday reversal patterns.

So here's what we're looking for we're looking for some sort of capitulatory price action some sort of panic flush right we're looking for something that basically feels like this move is never going to get any better.

That nobody wants to buy it or if you're looking for reversals to the downside you just flip the charts upside down and it really feels like nobody's ever going to sell a single share of this stock ever again and then you want to see something distinct and you saw a couple failures and a couple trend breaks and then one distinct and noticeable just by program right from the beginning of the day.

Those are things that you're looking for and then the biggest thing is make sure that you're trailing and having a better set of expectations for the trade so many traders will recognize this but the biggest thing is they will trade it on the intraday time frame only and they won't take advantage of the moves that are setting up for that day or the following day or the following three or four days.
So when you have the context right in these trades and you get the intraday reversal pattern like this you're putting yourself in a position to make 2026 a great trading year for you.
If you want to come subscribe check us out we put out content like this all the time and we have a video on reading the tape that you can watch right now.
Thanks. Stop washing charts all day hoping for trades.
Our Wall Street scanner alerts you minutes before a profitable setup triggers just like it does for a $20 million a year traders.
At S&V Capital we're not your typical secretive Wall Street firm instead of hiding our strategies we built our success by sharing them.
Our New York trading floor houses dozens of professional traders many of whom are seven figure and even eight figure per year earners and we hire select remote traders worldwide.
Are you constantly feeling like becoming consistently profitable is just around the corner but you're never actually getting there.
Here's what we've learned in nearly 20 years of training elite traders scalping is by far the fastest and easiest way to become consistently profitable in US stocks.
Now we're talking about hit and run trading in and out of the market within five to 30 minutes.
Here's the challenge though when you're trading alone without the support of a proper environment it's extremely difficult to find good scalps consistently.
The key is being in the right stocks at the right time and spotting what we call easy money setups.

How much time and money have you lost trading without real world edge that's exactly why we developed the S&V scalp radar a groundbreaking tool that does 80% of the heavy lifting by scanning US stocks in real time.
So we programmed it with five of our most powerful scalping strategies the same ones that have collectively made our firm tens of millions of dollars.
The radar identifies the 20 to 40 stocks in play during each session.
It detects 7 to 12 high quality scalping opportunities daily.
It alerts you minutes before these setups trigger giving you time to prepare and then it monitors the market in real time so you never actually miss a setup.
Look, there's a reason why professional trading floors work.
Traders helping traders spot and execute their best setups in real time and that's exactly what the scalp radar does for independent traders like you.
It's having a team of professional traders scanning the market alongside you pointing out the highest probability setups even before they happen.
What would it mean to have the same advantages as professional traders on a Wall Street trading floor?
Because these are the exact same setups are professional traders use every day.
You're not just getting some theoretical system.
You're actually getting battle tested strategies that actually work in today's markets.
We've distilled nearly two decades of proprietary trading experience into five core concepts that provide numerous great trades day in and day out.
This isn't just another automated system. This is a tool that trains you to build real, repeatable trading skills while relieving your trading uncertainty.

So if you're tired of the endless trading struggle, if you're fed up with taking one step forward and then two steps back, if you're ready to do something truly different back by two decades of Wall Street success, then here's what you need to do right now.
Now, this is a free intensive workshop where you'll get a detailed tour of the scalp radar in action.
You'll see exactly how it detects robust scalping opportunities in real time, relieving your trading uncertainty.
So click the link to grab your free seat and you'll get a detailed tour of the revolutionary scalp radar.
You get the exact entry and exit rules of five of our top scalping strategies.
You'll get convenient cheat sheets with all the rules and you'll get extra valuable execution information for each strategy that the entries and exits for each strategy.
These workshop spots are limited and they'll fill up quickly. Don't waste another day trading without a real world edge.
One that's proven by traders who make real money register for your free spot now by clicking the link below.
Remember, these are the same strategies that help three of our traders each make nearly $20 million in a single year.
The only question is, will you be next?

metadata.description:
Learn the top 3 trade setups we are using on the desk here: https://bit.ly/49aToaI

In this video, we dive deep into the top five reversal patterns that professional traders utilize for successful day trading. Join us as we explore real-life examples from recent trades, breaking down each pattern bar-by-bar to highlight key moments and decision-making processes. Active traders will learn how to identify potential reversals, manage risk effectively, and understand the psychology behind market moves.

#daytrading #reversalpatterns #tradingstrategy

00:00 – Introduction to Reversal Patterns  
00:40 – Pattern Number One
10:19 – Pattern Number Two
20:13 – Pattern Number Three
25:55 – Pattern Number Four
29:50 – Pattern Number Five

*SMB Disclosures* https://www.smbtraining.com/blog/smb-disclosures
